suggestions.topic: EIP-8037 simplification and testing complexity resolution
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #235 identified that EIP-8037 broke ~30% of tests and raised strong complexity concerns. Teams were asked to explore simplifications before this call. This is blocking bal-devnet-4 stability and Glamsterdam DevNet progress.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam DevNet 0 status and ePBS stability
suggestions.rationale: DevNet 0 was targeting launch on April 24 (day after ACDE #235) with Prysm and Geth. Previous ePBS DevNet 1 had multiple consensus bugs and client disconnections. Critical to confirm if launch succeeded and whether other clients can join.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7979 (CALLSUB/RETURNSUB) breakout outcome and inclusion decision
suggestions.rationale: Marked as PFI for Hegota in ACDE #235. Greg Colvin was to schedule a breakout call to discuss. This EIP needs either CFI or rejection before the fork scope solidifies.
Marked as PFI for Hegota in ACDE #235. This is a simple opcode reservation for L2/alt-L1 use. Should move to CFI or be rejected to finalize Hegota scope.

suggestions.topic: Account Abstraction breakout outcome and path forward
suggestions.rationale: Pedro was to schedule an AA breakout after ACDE #234 to align on proposal paths. Frame transactions is CFI'd as non-headliner, but other AA proposals (Wallet Title Deeds ERC, Scheme transactions) were discussed. Need clarity on which proposals are actively pursued for Hegota.

suggestions.topic: BAL DevNet 4 launch timing and dynamic EIP-8037 spec readiness
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #235 mentioned test release consumed by clients with implementation ongoing. DevNet 4 was targeting 'next Wednesday' (April 24) but status unclear. Depends on EIP-8037 simplification resolution.

suggestions.topic: Engine API PR 786 implementation status across clients
suggestions.rationale: PR 786 (reorg to finalized hash) was selected for implementation in ACDE #235. EL teams were asked to review and provide feedback. Check if all clients have implemented or if blockers exist.

suggestions.topic: History pruning target consensus and EIP-4444 alignment
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #234 showed consensus emerging around 1 month minimum history. Teams were asked to discuss targets in History Expirator Discord channel. Informational update on whether consensus solidified.
